zh.lifeSummary: Oliver Nye是Nye的兒子，於大約1580年出生在英國素瑞奧可利。他和Precilla至少有3個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於大約1612年在他的家鄉享年34歲，埋葬在英國素瑞奧可利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Oliver Nye是Nye的儿子，于大约1580年出生在英国素瑞奧可利。他和Precilla至少有3个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于大约1612年在他的家乡享年34岁，埋葬在英国素瑞奧可利。

nameMeanings.name: Nye
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southern): from a misdivision of the Middle English phrase atten eye, atten ye ‘at the island’ (Old English ēg, īeg ‘island’), becoming atte nye. The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived on an island or patch of firm ground surrounded by marsh, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Nye in Winscombe, Somerset.

English: alternatively, from a misdivision of the Middle English phrase atten eye, atten ee ‘at the river’ (Old English ēa ‘river’), becoming atte nee. The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived near a river, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Neigh Bridge in Somerford Keynes, Wiltshire.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 聶, see   Nie   2.

variants.name: Yeo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Yong, Cheng, In, Li, Youngho, Bock, Byeong, Chi, Eunsook, Fung, Hoon, In Young.

English (Devon): from southwestern Middle English ya, yo, yeo ‘river or stream’ (Old English ēa), either a topographic name denoting residence near a stream or a habitational name from any of several minor places in Devon and Somerset named with this word. The same word is found in Nye , Rye , and Tye .

variants.name: Ney
meanings: Scottish and Irish (Cavan): Anglicized and shortened form of Gaelic Mac Niadh, see McNee .
North German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): variant of   Neu  . The Jewish surname may sometimes be a shortened form of a name such as   Neuburger  .

variants.name: Nigh
meanings: Possibly an Americanized form of German   Neu   or   Ney  .

variants.name: Nie
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Xiaosong, Cui, Dawei, Fei, Fen, Feng, Geng, Hui, Hui Ling, Huiming, Jin, Jing.
English (Essex and Middlesex): variant of   Nye  .

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 聶, meaning ‘whisper’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Nie (聶), the name of a fief (located in Henan province) granted to an official in the state of Wey (衛). (ii) from the placename Nie (聶), the name of a fief (located in Shandong province) granted to a son of the Duke Ding of Qi (ruler of the state of Qi, reigned 1014–975  BC ).

variants.name: Rea
meanings: English: from a misdivision of the Middle English phrase atter ye ‘at the island’ (Old English ēg, īeg). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived on an island or patch of firm ground surrounded by marsh, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Rye (Sussex), The Rye in High Wycombe (Buckinghamshire), Rye Hill in Epping Upland (Essex), Rye Mill in Feering (Essex), and Rye House in Stanstead Abbots (Hertfordshire). Alternatively, the name may also arise from a misdivision of the Middle English phrase atter eye ‘at the river’ (Old English ēa) and may also be topographic, for someone who lived near a river or stream, or habitational, from a place so named, such as Rea in Hempsted (Gloucestershire), Ray Lodge in Lingfield (Surrey), and Rye Farm in Cranleigh (Surrey). Due to the similarity of Middle English forms it is now impossible to distinguish between the two explanations. See also Nye .

nameMeanings.name: Oliver
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a French name, Olivier, recorded as the name of one of Charlemagne's paladins (retainers), the close companion in arms of Roland in the Chanson de Roland. Whereas Roland is headstrong and rash, Oliver is thoughtful and cautious. Ostensibly this name derives from Late Latin olivarius ‘olive tree’ ( compare Olive ), but Charlemagne's other paladins all bear solidly Germanic names, so it is more probably an altered form of a Germanic name, perhaps distantly connected with Old Norse Óleifr ‘ancestral relic’. It has remained in more or less continuous use since the medieval period, becoming ever more popular since the 1980s.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: Oliver Nye was born about 1580, in Ockley, Surrey, England as the son of Nye. He had at least 3 sons and 4 daughters with Precilla. He died about 1612, in his hometown, at the age of 34, and was buried in Ockley, Surrey, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Oliver Nye est né environ 1580, à Ockley, Surrey, Angleterre, fils de Nye. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles avec Precilla. Il est décédé environ 1612, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterré à Ockley, Surrey, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Oliver Nye wurde um 1580 in Ockley, Surrey, England, als Sohn von Nye geboren. Er hatte mit Precilla mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb um 1612 im Alter von 34 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Ockley, Surrey, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Oliver Nye è nato il circa 1580 nel Ockley, Surrey, England come figlio di Nye. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie con Precilla. Morì circa 1612, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolto a Ockley, Surrey, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Oliver Nyeは約1580年にイギリススリーオックリーでNyeの息子として生まれた。彼はPrecillaとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1612年に故郷で34歳で死去し，イギリススリーオックリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Oliver Nye(은)는 대략 1580년 영국 수리 옥클리에서 Nye의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Precilla(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1612년 그의 고향에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수리 옥클리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Oliver Nye nasceu aproximadamente 1580, em Ockley, Surrey, Inglaterra filho de Nye. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas com Precilla. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1612, em sua cidade natal, com 34 anos, e foi sepultado em Ockley, Surrey, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Oliver Nye родился около 1580 г. в местности оккли, сурри, Англия. Его отца звали Nye. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери от Precilla. Он умер около 1612 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 34 лет и был похоронен в местности оккли, сурри, Англия.

sm.about 1580–about 1612: e tusa o le 1580–e tusa o le 1612

es.lifeSummary: Oliver Nye nació aproximadamente 1580, en Ockley, Surrey, Inglaterra como hijo de Nye. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas con Precilla. Murió aproximadamente 1612, en su pueblo, a la edad de 34 años, y fue sepultado en Ockley, Surrey, Inglaterra.
